reasoning: RULE A applied: get_japan_heritage returns 文化庁 日本遺産 stories — a different entity class from spiritual pilgrimage routes (Kumano Kodo, Saigoku Kannon, Dewa Sanzan Shugendo, etc.). Groundedness/accuracy/expression are high because the 文化庁 data and advisory routing are real and accurate.
